nodes.context: A criminal gang in Croxteth, Liverpool, involved in the murder of Rhys Jones.
A rival gang to the Croxteth Crew, based in Norris Green, Liverpool.

edges.evidence_quote: The murder came the day before the first anniversary of the killing of Liam Smith, an alleged member of a rival gang, the Norris Green Strand Crew, who was shot dead by members of the Croxteth Crew on 23 August 2006.
edges.context: The Croxteth Crew killed a member of the Norris Green Strand Crew, indicating a violent rivalry.
